SCROLL TO EXPLORE
about taiko
Taiko is Ethereum, extended.
We're working on the full Ethereum ZK-EVM circuits as part of a community effort led by the Ethereum Foundation's Privacy and Scaling Explorations (PSE) team.
Learn more about Taiko
our solutions
Scale natively, compose synchronously
Use superpowers from Ethereum (L1) sequencing to unlock new paradigms in scalablity
